description: Canonical catalog of conversion options shared by ainconv-js, ainconv-py and ainconv-rs. Each implementation maps the camelCase `key` to its own idiomatic naming (e.g. snake_case) and must support exactly this set; the per-language test suites assert parity against this file. The `variants` arrays in test_cases.json only use keys defined here.

options.description: Rewrite the horizontal ellipsis … (U+2026) as three ASCII full stops `...`. Default keeps the single semantically-correct character.
Keep ヰ (wi) instead of spelling it out as ウィ.
Keep ヱ (we) instead of spelling it out as ウェ.
Keep ヲ (wo) instead of spelling it out as ウォ.
Keep the small ィ for the -y coda instead of イ.
Keep the small ゥ for the -w coda instead of ウ.
Keep ㇴ for the -n coda instead of ン.
